title: Mobile Engineer (Flutter)
description:
We are seeking a junior Mobile Engineer (Flutter) to join our team. As a Mobile Engineer, you will be responsible for developing high-quality mobile applications using Flutter and Firebase. You will work closely with our cross-functional team to design, develop, test, and deploy mobile applications.

Responsibilities:
- Develop high-quality mobile applications using Flutter and Firebase
- Collaborate with designers to implement UI/UX designs
- Work with backend engineers to integrate APIs and data storage
- Test and debug mobile applications
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the codebase
- Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in mobile development

Must-have skills:
- Flutter
- Firebase
- Dart
- SQL
- Mobile Development
- Git
- Agile
- CI/CD

Nice to have:
- Experience with REST API
- Knowledge of UX design principles
- Familiarity with testing frameworks
